Onboarding.welcomeDesc: An interactive reading platform designed for children with dyslexia and their families.
Onboarding.welcomeFeatureMultimodal: Multimodal learning with text and audio narration
Onboarding.welcomeFeatureAccessible: Accessible interface with dyslexia-friendly typography and adjustable settings
Onboarding.welcomeFeatureProgress: Progress tracking so you can celebrate every reading milestone
Onboarding.welcomeCapabilitiesTitle: What your family can do on Lexopia
Onboarding.welcomeReassurance: Lexopia supports diverse learning styles and helps children build confidence through positive, pressure-free reading practice.
Onboarding.step2Desc: This name and age will shape their first personalized story.
Onboarding.step3Desc: The most important step — helps us set the right story difficulty.
Onboarding.step4Desc: Pick themes your child loves. They become the setting for their adventure.
Onboarding.step5Desc: Set a reading rhythm, review the summary, and create your child's learning path.
Onboarding.childNameHint: Use the name your child likes to be called — it will appear in their stories.
Onboarding.assignedChallengesDesc: Select the challenge types you'd like us to prioritize in your child's stories.
Onboarding.selectAtLeastOneChallenge: Select at least one challenge type

multipleChoice.purpose: Builds story comprehension with a low reading load — ideal when long text is tiring.
multipleChoice.howItWorks: After a story section, your child picks one answer from a few short options.
multipleChoice.example: "What did Mia find?" — cave, egg, or river.

trueFalse.purpose: Checks simple understanding of story facts without writing or long answers.
trueFalse.howItWorks: Your child hears or reads a short statement from the story and taps True or False. Audio narration helps reduce decoding effort.
trueFalse.example: "The dinosaur was alone." — True or False.

sequencing.purpose: Strengthens working memory and story-order skills by putting events in the right sequence.
sequencing.howItWorks: Your child drags 3–4 event cards (with text) into the correct chronological order.
sequencing.example: Order: Mia finds the egg → hears a sound → meets a friend.

fillBlank.purpose: Practices vocabulary and word recognition using story context.
fillBlank.howItWorks: A sentence from the story has one missing word. Your child drags the correct word from a small word bank into the blank.
fillBlank.example: "Mia walked into the ___." — choose cave from the word bank.

completeWord.purpose: Targets letter patterns and spelling — especially helpful for phonics practice.
completeWord.howItWorks: A word appears with a missing letter. Your child taps the correct letter tile to complete it.
completeWord.example: "F_rest" — tap o, a, or e to complete "Forest".

letterDiscrimination.purpose: Helps with commonly reversed letters like b/d and p/q.
letterDiscrimination.howItWorks: Similar-looking letters are shown and your child picks the one that matches a spoken or written prompt.
letterDiscrimination.example: Show b and d — "Which letter does 'dog' start with?"

soundMatch.purpose: Builds phonemic awareness by linking sounds to the right letters or words.
soundMatch.howItWorks: Your child hears a sound or phoneme and taps the matching letter or word option.
soundMatch.example: Play the /k/ sound — tap c, k, or s.

readAloud.purpose: Supports oral reading fluency and confident pronunciation.
readAloud.howItWorks: Your child reads a target word or short phrase from the story aloud. Speech recognition checks their pronunciation gently.
readAloud.example: "Read this word from the story: cave."

wordBuild.purpose: Practices spelling and letter order by building words step by step.
wordBuild.howItWorks: Your child hears a target word via audio, then arranges letter tiles in the correct order.

AiStorytellingIntro.title: Weekly Generated Stories
AiStorytellingIntro.subtitle: Create personalized adventures where your child is the hero
AiStorytellingIntro.feature1Desc: Each week, new stories featuring your child as the main character
AiStorytellingIntro.feature2Desc: Stories aligned with the skills you want your child to develop
AiStorytellingIntro.feature3Desc: Interactive challenges to reach objectives and build confidence
AiStorytellingIntro.mainDescription: Your child will embark on weekly adventures where they're the hero! Stories are tailored to their interests and designed to help them reach your chosen learning objectives. Watch as they grow in confidence, expand their vocabulary, and develop critical thinking skills all through the joy of reading.

riddleInterface.solvedAnswerREAD_ALOUD: Wonderful reading! You pronounced it clearly!
